free_text: AMS measurements of thin-target cross sections for the
production of 10-Be and 26-Al by high-energy protons.
For energies below 200 MeV, where generally
the production of secondary's is less important,
Uncertainty of determination of target masses.
Uncertainty of chemical separation and yields.
No error was assigned to the monitor cross-section.
REACTION formalism was introduced in Subents 006, 008,
Admixture Another Isotopes of Oxigen can not Change
